sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES S-box lookup table (256x8) used for SubBytes and key expansion SubWord.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand_round: Combinational single-round AES-128 key expansion: RotWord, SubWord, Rcon XOR, and word-chain XORs to produce next 128-bit round key.
sub_modules.aes_round_function: Combinational AES round transform: SubBytes, ShiftRows, optional MixColumns (skipped on last round), and AddRoundKey.
